entries.name: refund-reconcile
entries.purpose: Nightly 03:00 UTC. Reconciles every non-terminal refund against provider authoritative state. Dispatches CheckRefundProviderStatusJob per-provider for every refund still in status IN ('processing', 'provider_error'). Alerts on drift > 0 or on stuck provider_error > 24h.

entries.name: refund-check-provider-status-stripe
entries.purpose: Hourly. Polls Stripe for the status of every refund in status='processing' + provider='stripe'. Stripe card refunds take 5-10 business days; hourly polling balances timeliness vs API rate limits.

entries.name: refund-check-provider-status-paddle
entries.purpose: Every 4h. Polls Paddle for the status of every refund in status='processing' + provider='paddle'.

entries.name: refund-check-provider-status-adyen
entries.purpose: Hourly. Polls Adyen for the status of every refund in status='processing' + provider='adyen'.

entries.name: refund-check-provider-status-square
entries.purpose: Every 4h. Polls Square for the status of every refund in status='processing' + provider='square'.

entries.name: refund-check-provider-status-paypal
entries.purpose: Hourly. Polls PayPal for the status of every refund in status='processing' + provider='paypal'.

entries.name: refund-audit-pending-approvals
entries.purpose: Twice daily (09:00 + 15:00 UTC). Reports refunds stuck in awaiting_approval > refund.approval.approval_sla_hours (default 24h). Actionable — consumer-protection-law SLAs risk breach. Emits stackra.refund.approvals_stale_total counter + dispatches admin notification when threshold breached.

entries.name: refund-purge-expired
entries.purpose: Weekly Sunday 05:00 UTC. Hard-purge refunds + refund_lines past 7-year (or 10-year Enterprise) retention. Invoice-linked refunds migrate to compliance_archive.refunds + compliance_archive.refund_lines prior to cascade (financial-obligation retention).
